name: chief-of-staff-lite
description: Set up and run a personalized, read-only daily CEO brief.

interface.shortDescription: A personalized daily chief of staff for CEOs
interface.longDescription: Chief of Staff Lite guides a CEO through safe one-time personalization, then produces a concise daily brief focused on decisions, meetings, risks, and follow-through where CEO attention changes the outcome.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up my personalized Chief of Staff Lite.
